title: stickmannia mexicana
parts: Stickmannia mexicana has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers, each containing a unique combination of bioactive compounds. The roots of Stickmannia mexicana are known to contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves of the plant contain phenolic compounds, including phenolic acids and flavonoids, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and exhibit antioxidant activity. The flowers of Stickmannia mexicana contain volatile oils and terpenoids, which are thought to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
